title: IELTS 听写重点句子
description: Pure English IELTS key sentences for dictation practice.

sentences.english: The brain, like any other body part, gets old.
sentences.chinese: 大脑和身体其他部位一样，都会老化。

sentences.english: However, not all brains age the same way.
sentences.chinese: 然而，并非所有大脑的衰老方式都相同。

sentences.english: For example, women's brains may age more slowly than men’s.
sentences.chinese: 例如，女性大脑的衰老速度可能比男性慢。

sentences.english: Researchers there wanted to find out how the brain uses sugar.
sentences.chinese: 那里的研究人员想了解大脑如何使用糖。

sentences.english: But the researchers do not know why.
sentences.chinese: 但研究人员不知道为什么。

sentences.english: Some scientists suggest that hormones could play a part.
sentences.chinese: 一些科学家认为激素可能发挥了作用。

sentences.english: All these changes slow our cognitive abilities.
sentences.chinese: 所有这些变化都会降低我们的认知能力。

sentences.english: We have trouble remembering things, finishing complex tasks or paying attention.
sentences.chinese: 我们很难记住事情、完成复杂的任务或集中注意力。

sentences.english: Sleep is the easiest and best thing you can do to keep your brain young.
sentences.chinese: 睡眠是保持大脑年轻最简单也是最好的事情。

sentences.english: Doctors say any diet that is good for the heart is also good for the brain.
sentences.chinese: 医生说，任何对心脏脏脏有益的饮食也对大脑有益。

sentences.english: It is not a secret that spending time outdoors is good for our health.
sentences.chinese: 花时间在户外对我们的健康有益，这已不是什么秘密。

sentences.english: This could be especially important for school children.
sentences.chinese: 这对于学童来说尤其重要。

sentences.english: New research suggests that kids may learn better when they are surrounded by greener spaces.
sentences.chinese: 新的研究表明，当孩子们被绿色空间包围时，他们可能会学得更好。

sentences.english: Children may find it difficult to resist computers, television and electronic games.
sentences.chinese: 孩子们可能会发现很难抗拒电脑、电视和电子游戏。

sentences.english: All this indoor activity can hurt a child’s physical and mental health.
sentences.chinese: 所有这些室内活动都会损害孩子的身心脏脏健康。

sentences.english: Researchers in Barcelona, Spain and in the United States are trying to answer that question.
sentences.chinese: 西班牙巴塞罗那和美国的研究人员正在试图回答这个问题。

sentences.english: The tests measured memory and attention span.
sentences.chinese: 这些测试测量了记忆力和注意力广度。

sentences.english: More trees means less air pollution.
sentences.chinese: 更多的树木意味着更少的空气污染。

sentences.english: Other experts say this study does not consider other factors that may play a part in a child’s learning environment.
sentences.chinese: 其他专家表示，这项研究没有考虑可能影响儿童学习环境的其他因素。

sentences.english: The question of how green spaces affect learning is a new one.
sentences.chinese: 绿色空间如何影响学习是一个新问题。

sentences.english: More studies are needed to learn why vegetation in and around schools improves mental ability.
sentences.chinese: 需要更多的研究来了解为什么学校及其周围的植被可以提高智力。

sentences.english: Technology has changed the way we live and especially the way we work.
sentences.chinese: 技术改变了我们的生活方式，尤其是我们的工作方式。

sentences.english: For many jobs, workers no longer need to be in a fixed office building.
sentences.chinese: 对于许多工作来说，工人不再需要呆在固定的办公楼里。

sentences.english: It is easy to think that this freedom to work whenever or wherever is good for workers and for families.
sentences.chinese: 人们很容易认为这种随时随地工作的自由对工人和家庭都有好处。

sentences.english: As it turns out, teleworking is both good and bad.
sentences.chinese: 事实证明，远程工作既有好处也有坏处。

sentences.english: Some teleworkers may have a hard time keeping their personal life separate from their professional life.
sentences.chinese: 一些远程工作人员可能很难将个人生活与职业生活分开。

sentences.english: The report also states that teleworkers who are out of the office too often say they feel isolated.
sentences.chinese: 该报告还指出，不在办公室的远程工作人员经常表示他们感到孤立。

sentences.english: Two or three days a week seems to be the sweet spot.
sentences.chinese: 每周两到三天似乎是最佳时间。

sentences.english: Reducing class size has traditionally been seen as an important way to improve a student’s educational experience.
sentences.chinese: 传统上，减少班级规模被视为改善学生教育体验的重要途径。

sentences.english: Many public opinion studies have shown that both teachers and parents favor smaller class sizes.
sentences.chinese: 许多舆论研究表明，老师和家长都赞成小班授课。

sentences.english: This can theoretically lead to improved academic results for students.
sentences.chinese: 从理论上讲，这可以提高学生的学业成绩。

sentences.english: Financial limitations make it very difficult for many schools to reduce the number of students in the classroom.
sentences.chinese: 财政限制使得许多学校很难减少课堂上的学生人数。

sentences.english: For mathematics achievement, the result was 49 percent.
sentences.chinese: 数学成绩为 49%。

sentences.english: The organization is in favor of smaller class sizes in U.S. schools.
sentences.chinese: 该组织支持美国学校缩小班级规模。

sentences.english: These are the short conversations we have at parties, while we wait in line at the store, at family events or work.
sentences.chinese: 这些是我们在聚会上、在商店排队等候时、在家庭活动或工作中进行的简短对话。

sentences.english: Often we have to make small talk with complete strangers.
sentences.chinese: 我们常常不得不与完全陌生的人闲聊。

sentences.english: Many people find these small conversations about random topics difficult.
sentences.chinese: 许多人发现这些关于随机话题的小对话很困难。

sentences.english: These exchanges can open doors that may lead to larger, more meaningful conversations.
sentences.chinese: 这些交流可以打开大门，从而引发更大规模、更有意义的对话。

sentences.english: Small talk also gives you the chance to decide if you want to get know that person better – or not.
sentences.chinese: 闲聊还让你有机会决定是否想更好地了解那个人。

sentences.english: Chitchat can also increase your feeling of understanding, or empathy, toward people you know but not well.
sentences.chinese: 闲聊还可以增加您对认识但不熟悉的人的理解或同理心脏脏。

sentences.english: Researchers at the University of Chicago then asked some participants in a study to talk to people while commuting to work on a train.
sentences.chinese: 芝加哥大学的研究人员随后要求一些研究参与者在乘坐火车上下班时与人们交谈。

sentences.english: Making small talk doesn’t have to be either awkward or boring.
sentences.chinese: 闲聊不一定是尴尬或无聊的。

sentences.english: These types of questions require more thought and more than a simple one-word answer.
sentences.chinese: 这类问题需要更多的思考，而不仅仅是简单的一个词的回答。

sentences.english: If you ask questions that need more details to answer, the conversation will go on longer.
sentences.chinese: 如果你提出的问题需要更多细节来回答，谈话就会持续更长时间。

sentences.english: Asking too many questions may make people feel they are in an interview rather than in a conversation.
sentences.chinese: 问太多问题可能会让人们感觉自己是在接受采访而不是在对话。

sentences.english: Like anything, getting good at making small talk takes practice.
sentences.chinese: 像任何事情一样，善于闲聊需要练习。

sentences.english: Meals could be a chance to stop what we’re doing and spend time with the people in our lives.
sentences.chinese: 进餐可能是我们停下手头的事情并与生活中的人共度时光的一个机会。

sentences.english: From time to time, we all eat last-minute meals alone.
sentences.chinese: 有时，我们都会独自吃最后一刻的饭菜。

sentences.english: Eating alone at home or at a restaurant can be a very satisfying experience.
sentences.chinese: 独自在家或在餐厅吃饭可能是一种非常令人满意的体验。

sentences.english: However, could eating too many meals alone be bad for our health or affect our future success?
sentences.chinese: 然而，单独吃太多饭是否会对我们的健康有害或影响我们未来的成功？

sentences.english: Several studies show that it might for some people.
sentences.chinese: 多项研究表明，这可能对某些人有用。

sentences.english: Frequently eating alone may lead to poor eating habits and poor food choices.
sentences.chinese: 经常单独吃饭可能会导致不良的饮食习惯和不良的食物选择。

sentences.english: However, they do suggest a strong correlation, or link.
sentences.chinese: 然而，它们确实表明存在很强的相关性或联系。

sentences.english: Students who shared a main meal with their families were less likely to skip school.
sentences.chinese: 与家人共享主餐的学生逃学的可能性较小。

sentences.english: If you live alone, reach out to those in your social circle or neighborhood.
sentences.chinese: 如果您独居，请与您的社交圈或邻居中的人联系。

sentences.english: For children, internet access is a double-edged sword.
sentences.chinese: 对于孩子来说，网络接入是一把双刃剑。

sentences.english: In other words, being able to get online can be both good and bad for kids.
sentences.chinese: 换句话说，能够上网对孩子来说既有好处也有坏处。

sentences.english: Digital technology can connect a child to information and to a larger community.
sentences.chinese: 数字技术可以将孩子与信息和更大的社区联系起来。

sentences.english: But on the bad side, it can also bring great harm and stress.
sentences.chinese: 但从坏的一面来看，它也会带来巨大的伤害和压力。

sentences.english: Being online has many benefits.
sentences.chinese: 上网有很多好处。

sentences.english: Access to the internet can change a child’s life.
sentences.chinese: 接入网络可以改变孩子的生活。

sentences.english: These offline children are missing out on the benefits offered by internet access.
sentences.chinese: 这些离线的孩子错过了网络接入带来的好处。

sentences.english: We call the gap between those who can easily get online and those who can't the digital divide.
sentences.chinese: 我们将那些能够轻松上网的人和那些不能上网的人之间的差距称为数字鸿沟。

sentences.english: Children everywhere must have access to the tools that will help them to participate and compete in an ever-growing digital economy.
sentences.chinese: 世界各地的儿童都必须能够获得有助于他们参与不断发展的数字经济并参与竞争的工具。

sentences.english: Making all this personal information public may put a child at risk.
sentences.chinese: 公开所有这些个人信息可能会使儿童面临风险。

sentences.english: Safeguarding children’s privacy on the internet is an issue of major concern.
sentences.chinese: 保护儿童在网络上的隐私是一个值得关注的问题。

sentences.english: Set house rules.
sentences.chinese: 制定房屋规则。

sentences.english: Modern technology has a strong influence on many things we do.
sentences.chinese: 现代技术对我们所做的许多事情都有很大的影响。

sentences.english: Technology is shaping almost every part of our day-to-day existence, including education.
sentences.chinese: 技术几乎正在塑造我们日常生活的方方面面，包括教育。

sentences.english: All of the classes take place online through a website.
sentences.chinese: 所有课程均通过网站上网进行。

sentences.english: The site lets students ask questions and complete their work from anywhere in the world.
sentences.chinese: 该网站允许学生在世界任何地方提出问题并完成他们的作业。

sentences.english: Having hundreds of students in a class means Ashok Goel has to answer thousands of questions.
sentences.chinese: 一个班级有数百名学生意味着 Ashok Goel 必须回答数千个问题。

sentences.english: She was able to answer questions faster than most other teaching assistants.
sentences.chinese: 她能够比大多数其他助教更快地回答问题。

sentences.english: It was only at the end of the semester that Goel’s students learned Watson’s secret.
sentences.chinese: 直到学期结束时，戈埃尔的学生才知道了沃森的秘密。

sentences.english: He hopes this technology will make it easier for teachers to create their own programs to use in and outside the classroom.
sentences.chinese: 他希望这项技术能让教师更轻松地创建自己的程序以在课堂内外使用。

sentences.english: The new kinds of technology becoming available will increase the availability of learning all over the world.
sentences.chinese: 新技术的出现将增加全世界学习的可能性。

sentences.english: The study found that the technology did little to help student performance.
sentences.chinese: 研究发现，该技术对学生的表现几乎没有帮助。

sentences.english: There is no system to make sure the technology is used the same way.
sentences.chinese: 没有系统可以确保该技术以相同的方式使用。

sentences.english: Technology does improve the availability of information.
sentences.chinese: 技术确实提高了信息的可用性。

sentences.english: Nothing can replace the personal relationship between teachers and students.
sentences.chinese: 没有什么可以取代师生之间的私人关系。

sentences.english: For many English learners, speaking is the most difficult part of the language to master.
sentences.chinese: 对于许多英语学习者来说，口语是语言中最难掌握的部分。

sentences.english: To improve your speaking skills, you need to be able to practice with other English learners or English speakers.
sentences.chinese: 为了提高您的口语技能，您需要能够与其他英语学习者或英语使用者一起练习。

sentences.english: English clubs can be helpful to your language-learning process.
sentences.chinese: 英语俱乐部可以帮助您的语言学习过程。

sentences.english: There are many reasons why English clubs can help learners of all ages and levels improve their English.
sentences.chinese: 英语俱乐部可以帮助所有年龄段和水平的学习者提高英语水平的原因有很多。

sentences.english: They offer learners a chance to practice English by actually speaking it.
sentences.chinese: 他们为学习者提供了通过实际说英语来练习英语的机会。

sentences.english: English clubs are less formal than a classroom setting.
sentences.chinese: 英语俱乐部不像教室那样正式。

sentences.english: They also let learners practice English in more real-life situations.
sentences.chinese: 他们还让学习者在更现实的生活场景中练习英语。

sentences.english: This can increase a learner’s desire to practice and learn on their own.
sentences.chinese: 这可以增加学习者自己练习和学习的愿望。

sentences.english: The first step in starting an English club is to find club members.
sentences.chinese: 创办英语俱乐部的第一步是寻找俱乐部成员。

sentences.english: It is a good idea to find a central location that is easy to get to.
sentences.chinese: 最好找到一个易于到达的中心脏脏位置。

sentences.english: The location of your club will affect how many people come to your meetings.
sentences.chinese: 您的俱乐部的位置将影响参加您的会议的人数。

sentences.english: If you have a good system of leadership, your club has a better chance at lasting.
sentences.chinese: 如果你有一个良好的领导体系，你的俱乐部就有更好的机会持久发展。

sentences.english: The main responsibility of the one leader is to organize and lead the meetings.
sentences.chinese: 一名领导的主要职责是组织和领导会议。

sentences.english: It also helps club members practice speaking English with real-life tasks.
sentences.chinese: 它还可以帮助俱乐部成员通过现实生活中的任务练习英语口语。

sentences.english: Following these steps will help any club have a successful start.
sentences.chinese: 遵循这些步骤将有助于任何俱乐部取得成功。

sentences.english: Many countries are experiencing a shortage.
sentences.chinese: 许多国家都面临短缺。

sentences.english: The use of English in medical settings worldwide continues to grow.
sentences.chinese: 全球医疗环境中英语的使用持续增长。

sentences.english: Nurses work in countless other places, such as health clinics, schools, private homes and assisted living centers.
sentences.chinese: 护士在无数其他地方工作，例如诊所、学校、私人住宅和辅助生活中心脏脏。

sentences.english: There are also many specializations within nursing.
sentences.chinese: 护理领域也有许多专业。

sentences.english: Throughout their career, nurses may work in one or many specialized areas.
sentences.chinese: 在整个职业生涯中，护士可能会在一个或多个专业领域工作。

sentences.english: They used PET scans to look at the flow of oxygen and sugar in the brains.
sentences.chinese: 他们使用 PET 扫描来观察大脑中氧气和糖的流动。

sentences.english: Their findings suggest that the brains of men and women may use sugar differently as they age.
sentences.chinese: 他们的研究结果表明，随着年龄的增长，男性和女性的大脑对糖的使用可能有所不同。

sentences.english: Communication between neurons may decrease.
sentences.chinese: 神经元之间的交流可能会减少。

sentences.english: Alzheimer’s disease is a progressive brain disorder that cannot be stopped.
sentences.chinese: 阿尔茨海默病是一种无法阻止的进行性脑部疾病。

sentences.english: People can telework: they can work from home or anyplace where they can access the necessary technology.
sentences.chinese: 人们可以远程工作：他们可以在家或任何可以获得必要技术的地方工作。

sentences.english: The report looked at 15 countries including Argentina, Brazil, India, Japan, the United States and 10 European nations.
sentences.chinese: 该报告调查了阿根廷、巴西、印度、日本、美国和 10 个欧洲国家等 15 个国家。

sentences.english: How teleworking affects the health and lifestyle of the workers seems to depend on how much and what type of teleworking they are doing.
sentences.chinese: 远程工作如何影响员工的健康和生活方式似乎取决于他们进行远程工作的程度和类型。

sentences.english: But one recent study suggests there is not much research-based evidence to support this idea.
sentences.chinese: 但最近的一项研究表明，没有太多基于研究的证据支持这一想法。

sentences.english: The researchers say the idea of smaller class sizes has been studied and debated for many years.
sentences.chinese: 研究人员表示，小班授课的想法已经被研究和争论了很多年。

sentences.english: The researchers’ goal was to examine the major research studies already completed on the subject.
sentences.chinese: 研究人员的目标是检查已经完成的关于该主题的主要研究。

sentences.english: She noted that the effects of larger class size can stay with the students long after they complete their education.
sentences.chinese: 她指出，班级规模扩大的影响在学生完成学业后仍会持续很长时间。

sentences.english: For children, eating with their families is not only about preventing bad outcomes – it is also about developing good ones.
sentences.chinese: 对于孩子来说，与家人一起吃饭不仅是为了防止不良后果，也是为了培养良好的后果。

sentences.english: Experts say that these studies do not seem to prove a cause-and-effect relationship.
sentences.chinese: 专家表示，这些研究似乎并不能证明因果关系。

sentences.english: These children also seemed to have better social skills and self-reported that they were less aggressive.
sentences.chinese: 这些孩子似乎也有更好的社交技能，并且自我报告说他们的攻击性较小。

sentences.english: It would be difficult to overstate the importance of nurses.
sentences.chinese: 护士的重要性怎么强调都不为过。

sentences.english: One of the major things that I truly enjoy about nursing is the diversity in the role.
sentences.chinese: 我真正喜欢护理的一大原因是角色的多样性。

sentences.english: A language barrier may impact a nurse’s interaction with a patient.
sentences.chinese: 语言障碍可能会影响护士与患者的互动。
